'''Camp Kaxol''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] military camp situated on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Krant]] and constructed after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. During the [[Battle of Krant (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Krant]] between the Imperials and the Rebels, its forces threatened the [[Krantian/Legends|Krantian]] [[City/Legends|cities]] of [[Peche]] and [[Theenes]].

==Description==
Camp Kaxol was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Military/Legends|military]] camp established on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Krant]]<ref name="SW:GB" /> between [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5]] and [[2 ABY/Legends|2]] years after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="The New Essential Chronology" /> It was located northeast of the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Theenes]]. Camp Kaxol was protected by a set of walls and two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser turrets]], while four [[Power core/Legends|power cores]] kept the base operational. The base's buildings included a [[Command center|Command Center]], three [[Barracks/Legends|troop center]]s, a [[Factory/Legends|mech factory]], and eight [[prefab shelter]]s along with a [[War Center]] and a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]]. A group of [[ASP-7 labor droid/Legends|ASP-7 labor droids]] were at its disposal for gathering resources.<ref name="SW:GB" />

==History==
After the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Diplomat/Legends|emissary]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] crashed on the planet, a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Camp Sagol]]'s [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] attacked a small [[Krantian/Legends|Krantian]] [[Small Village|village]], although they were [[Death/Legends|cut down]] by Organa's [[Rebel trooper/Legends|escorts]] and the exiled [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Echuu Shen-Jon]]. Camp Kaxol, along with another Imperial camp, [[Camp Sagol|Sagol]], then [[Battle of Krant (Galactic Civil War)|commenced their attacks]] on the Krantian cities of Peche and [[Theenes]], targeting the [[bridge]]s which connected the cities to each other. The two military camps sent a group of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[Dewback trooper/Legends|dewback troopers]]. Organa took control of the small village and raised an [[Army/Legends|army]] to defeat Kaxol and Sagol, destroying their ability to make war.<ref name="SW:GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|You have beaten Camp Kaxol!!!|The notification to the player after defeating Camp Kaxol|<ref name="SW:GB" />}}
Camp Kaxol first appeared in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. One of the two camps must be destroyed by the player's army, forcing the other camp to withdraw. It has not been [[canon]]ically established which was destroyed, as the player can complete the level by attacking and eliminating either one or the other. As the choice is a matter of game mechanics, this article is neutral to that choice. Only one of the camps has to be destroyed to finish the mission, although the game's [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]], released before the game itself, suggests the player target Kaxol, the closer camp to the cities.
